requirements_met: Complex jobs include more patterns/warnings than simple jobs
Single source of truth for band names via ComplexityBand enum
validation_results.test_output_summary: 15 passed in 0.18s - All complexity band tests verified: enum existence, simple/complex weight differences, token budget enforcement, and seam integration
validation_results.code_quality: All files pass ruff check with zero errors. Wiring analyzer reports parse_degraded on composition.py but with no findings and successful test imports, indicating valid Python code.
edge_cases_covered: Composition with only patterns and warnings
All three complexity bands respect token budget
Budget enforcement from assembly layer not bypassed

criteria_verification.notes: ComplexityBand enum with SIMPLE, STANDARD, COMPLEX values implemented. Test test_complexity_band_enum_exists passed. compose_by_complexity() function accepts complexity_band parameter.

COMPLEX band weight (2.0) vs SIMPLE band weight (0.3) for pattern_warning type confirmed. Tests test_simple_band_reduces_pattern_and_warning_share and test_complex_band_increases_pattern_and_warning_share both passed.

Token budget enforcement verified via test_composition_respects_token_budget and seam test test_composition_respects_budget_from_assembly. Composition delegates to assembly's assemble_context() which enforces budget.
ComplexityBand enum (inheriting from str, Enum) serves as single source of truth. Test test_complexity_band_enum_exists verifies enum structure. No scattered string literals.
ruff check src/fleet_memory/retrieval/ returned 'All checks passed!' with zero errors as confirmed in requirements evidence bundle.

rationale: All 5 acceptance criteria verified by deterministic evidence. Independent test run shows 15/15 tests passed including all complexity band, budget enforcement, and enum tests. Quality gates (tests, coverage, plan audit) all passed. Honesty discrepancies are reporting accuracy issues (claiming already-committed files in files_modified) with should_fix severity, not critical fabrications - the actual work is evidenced by passing independent tests that import and execute the implemented code. Implementation is complete and correct.
